item.title: Abhishek Sankar
item.description: Download PDF resume Contact Pittsburgh, PA (+1) 412 909 9156 Email • Website • LinkedIn • Github Education Carnegie Mellon University • Pittsburgh • PA Master of Science • Artificial Intelligence and Innovation Anticipated graduation - 05/26 GPA: 3.93 College of Engineering Trivandrum • Trivandrum • India Bachelor of Technology • Computer Science & Engineering Graduated - 07/21 GPA: 9.0 Skills Python, PyTorch, Java, JavaScript, C++, PyTorch, SQL, React, Redux, Next.

item.title: Hack a startup - Gumbo (Post is WiP)
item.description: Taking a dive, I’m meant for this.

item.title: [ Placement Advice ] Probably.
item.description: The hoops to jump through for a job after undergrad at CET

I’m Abhishek Sankar, currently pursuing my MS in Artificial Intelligence and Innovation at Carnegie Mellon University. I previously worked a software engineer at Providence, where I got to work on interesting problems in healthcare. I’m passionate about building products that solve real-world problems. Small ones and the not so small ones. I’ve been a part of a few hackathons and have won a few of them. I’m currently working on Sebastian Raschka’s book Build a Large Language Model, where I’m learning about the internals of GPT-2 and GPT-3.

To check the ranking of my team “kami” in the IEEE Xtreme 14.0 competition, follow these steps: Visit the IEEE Xtreme 14.0 ranking page at ieeextreme.org. Locate the search bar on the page. Enter the team name “kami” into the search bar. Press the “Enter” key or click the search button to view the results.
